nasb.text: Then Menahem exacted the money from Israel, even from all the mighty men of wealth, from each man fifty shekels of silver to pay the king of Assyria. So the king of Assyria returned and did not remain there in the land.

esv.text: Menahem exacted the money from Israel, that is, from all the wealthy men, fifty shekels of silver from every man, to give to the king of Assyria. So the king of Assyria turned back and did not stay there in the land.

cnv.text: 米拿現向以色列人，就是所有大財主強索銀子，每人五百七十克，好獻給亞述王。於是亞述王回去了，不在以色列地停留。

ccb.text: 这些银子是米拿现向以色列的所有富户征收来的，每人五百五十克。于是亚述王从以色列境内退兵回国。
